overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character exploring an industrial urban fringe area with massive elevated highways, electrical infrastructure, and futuristic architecture. The sequence transitions from a paved street with light traffic to a dirt underpass area, then focuses on a towering skyscraper before returning to a neon-lit commercial street.

events.description: dark van drives past from left to right on the multi-lane road
pickup truck drives past from left to right, followed by other vehicles
character moves from paved sidewalk onto dirt terrain on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a multi-lane industrial road, observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: dark van driving along the road from left to right
person in orange jacket walking along the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: massive multi-level concrete highway structure casting shadows on the street
tall metal lattice tower with multiple high-voltage power lines extending across the scene
industrial building with vertical neon signage and red structural elements
multi-lane paved road with yellow dividing lines and red curbs

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view walking along an industrial street dominated by a massive elevated highway overpass on the left and electrical transmission towers ahead. Vehicles including a dark van and pickup truck pass by on the asphalt road while sparse pedestrians walk along the sidewalks. The environment features a mix of industrial architecture and neon signage under bright midday sun.

events.description: moves from paved street onto dirt ground beneath the elevated highway structure
camera tilts upward to view the underside of the overpass and surrounding infrastructure

agents.ego_description: moving through the dirt area under the elevated highways, examining the industrial structures and cooling towers

notable_agents.action: person in white tank top and red beanie walking past the camera

entered.detail: large cylindrical concrete cooling towers with steam vents visible in the background
dry dirt ground with sparse desert vegetation and scattered debris

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a dirt underpass area beneath the massive highway structure, with the ground changing from asphalt to dry dirt with sparse vegetation. Industrial cooling towers become visible in the background. A pedestrian in a red beanie passes by as the camera explores the sheltered, shadowed environment under the overpasses.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor looking up at mega-structure

events.description: camera tilts sharply upward to focus on the massive futuristic skyscraper towering overhead
camera slowly pans down from the skyscraper while maintaining forward movement

agents.ego_description: standing and looking up at the massive skyscraper, admiring the scale and architectural details of the industrial tower

entered.detail: massive towering industrial building with metal paneling, warning stripes, and sun glare reflecting off the upper floors

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to focus on a colossal futuristic skyscraper dominating the skyline, with the sun creating lens flare off the building's metallic surface. The perspective emphasizes the tower's height against the clear blue sky, with power lines and transmission towers framing the view. The environment is devoid of people, emphasizing the scale of the industrial architecture.

events.description: returns to street level revealing commercial buildings and pedestrian activity
vehicle drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past commercial buildings with bright neon signs, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street ahead
car driving along the road from right to left

entered.detail: small commercial building with green facade and red FOODSTUFFS signage
building facade with prominent green and red neon signage and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera pans down from the skyscraper to reveal a commercial street level with a FOODSTUFFS store and buildings adorned with bright green and red neon signage. Pedestrians are visible crossing the street ahead, and vehicles pass by on the road. The scene transitions back to a more populated urban environment with the elevated highway visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an industrial urban fringe that shifts from a bustling street to a desolate underpass before culminating in a view of a towering skyscraper and a neon-lit commercial district. It begins on a sunlit asphalt road dominated by a massive elevated highway and electrical transmission towers, where vehicles and pedestrians move past industrial architecture. As the camera moves forward, the paved street gives way to a shadowed dirt underpass with sparse vegetation and distant cooling towers, momentarily isolating the viewer from the city's traffic. The perspective then tilts sharply upward to capture a colossal futuristic skyscraper against a clear blue sky, with lens flares reflecting off its metallic surface. Finally, the camera pans back down to reveal a populated commercial street filled with bright green and red neon signage and a Foodstuffs store, returning the scene to a vibrant urban environment.
